posts.text: Hi, Recently started tracking the entity after management change. Anyone tracking the entity kindly share some insight on below aspects: Cash sitting on balance sheet - With last reported numbers can we assume apprx INR 250 available per share and how this impacts valuation. Need to look at PAN validation revenue as every digital loan/account will pass through this step. Is there any competition here and what is the revenue per validation request. Impact of change in billing structure for NPS
